# Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / strategy
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes and new code is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs / README / CHANGELOG updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or private keys are committed
